description: You are a Portfolio Manager setting up tracking for the 'Mobile Banking Upgrade' project. Create three new Project-level custom fields: 'Regulatory Compliance' (Boolean format, default value No), 'Budget Code' (Text format, required), and 'Portfolio Phase' (List format with values: Strategy, Execution, Closing). Once created, configure the 'Mobile Banking Upgrade' project with the following values: Regulatory Compliance set to Yes, Budget Code set to 'FIN-2024-Q3', and Portfolio Phase set to 'Execution'. Save the project settings.
